name: create_booking
description: Create the confirmed booking once the guest has approved the summary and payment method. Returns a real confirmation number and a booking summary. Use this only after check_availability and an explicit go-ahead from the guest. The agent must announce the returned confirmation_number exactly.

room_id.description: The room identifier from check_availability, e.g. 'canyon-view-suite'.

payment_ref.description: Opaque reference to the payment method on file (e.g. 'visa-on-file', 'genius-visa-4782'). Never collect full card numbers.

returns.description: The confirmation number and summary, plus a payload that renders a confirmation card and navigates the site to the confirmation page. Expected shape:
